201.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ led the people in prayer while sitting due to illness. They began to pray standing, so he gestured to them to sit down. When he finished, he said: 'The imam is appointed to be followed. When he bows, bow; when he rises, rise. And if he prays sitting, then pray sitting.'
201.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ mengimami shalat dalam keadaan duduk karena sakit. Para sahabat mulai shalat berdiri, lalu beliau memberi isyarat agar mereka duduk. Ketika selesai, beliau bersabda: 'Imam dijadikan untuk diikuti. Apabila ia ruku, maka rukuklah; apabila ia bangkit, maka bangkitlah. Dan jika ia shalat duduk, maka shalatlah kalian duduk.'

202.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that on the Day of Sacrifice, beef was brought to her. She said: 'What is this?' They replied: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ slaughtered on behalf of his wives.' Yahya said: Shu'bah said — I mentioned that to al-Qasim, and he said: 'The hadith came to you correctly.'
202.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa pada hari Idul Adha, daging sapi dibawa kepadanya. Ia bertanya: 'Apa ini?' Mereka menjawab: 'Rasulullah ﷺ menyembelih atas nama para istrinya.' Yahya berkata: Syu'bah berkata — aku menyebutkan itu kepada al-Qasim, dan ia berkata: 'Hadis itu sampai kepadamu dengan benar.'

203.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she mentioned the matter to the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and he said: 'Let your paternal uncle come in to see you.' She said: 'But it was the woman who nursed me, not the man.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'He is your uncle, so let him come in.'
203.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia menyebutkan masalah itu kepada Rasulullah ﷺ, dan beliau bersabda: 'Biarkanlah pamanmu masuk menemuimu.' Ia berkata: 'Tapi yang menyusuiku adalah wanita, bukan laki-laki.' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Ia adalah pamanmu, maka biarkanlah ia masuk.'

204.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'When the prayer is established and supper is ready, begin with supper.' Waki' said: 'When the prayer time comes and supper is ready.' Ibn Uyaynah said: 'When supper is served.'
204.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Apabila shalat didirikan dan makan malam telah siap, mulailah dengan makan malam.' Waki' berkata: 'Apabila waktu shalat tiba dan makan malam telah siap.' Ibnu Uyaynah berkata: 'Apabila makan malam dihidangkan.'

205.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said regarding menstruation: 'That is only a vein. When menstruation begins, leave the prayer; and when it ends, wash away the blood from yourself and pray.' Yahya said: I asked Hisham, 'One wash — does she take a full bath and perform ablution before each prayer?' He said: 'Yes.'
205.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda tentang haid: 'Itu hanyalah pembuluh darah. Apabila haid datang, tinggalkanlah shalat; dan apabila telah berlalu, bersihkanlah darah dari dirimu dan shalatlah.' Yahya berkata: Aku bertanya kepada Hisyam, 'Sekali mandi — apakah ia mandi besar dan berwudhu sebelum setiap shalat?' Ia berkata: 'Ya.'

206.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said — and she was a young girl who had not read much of the Quran: 'By Allah, I know that you have heard about this until it settled in your hearts and you believed it. If I tell you that I am innocent — and Allah the Almighty knows that I am innocent — you will not believe me. And if I confess to something — while Allah knows I am innocent — you will believe me.'
206.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata — dan ia adalah seorang gadis muda yang belum banyak membaca Al-Qur'an: 'Demi Allah, aku tahu bahwa kalian telah mendengar hal ini hingga menetap di hati kalian dan kalian mempercayainya. Jika aku katakan bahwa aku tidak bersalah — dan Allah Yang Maha Kuasa mengetahui bahwa aku tidak bersalah — kalian tidak akan mempercayaiku. Dan jika aku mengaku sesuatu — sementara Allah mengetahui aku tidak bersalah — kalian akan mempercayaiku.'

207.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Abu Bakr said — when the Prophet ﷺ came at an unusual hour: 'May my father and mother be his ransom, he must have come for some matter.' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered and sought permission, which was granted. When he entered, he said to Abu Bakr: 'Send away those who are with you.' Abu Bakr said: 'They are only your family, may my father and mother be your ransom, O Messenger of Allah.' The Prophet ﷺ said: 'Indeed, permission has been granted.'
207.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Abu Bakar berkata — ketika Nabi ﷺ datang pada waktu yang tidak biasa: 'Semoga ayah dan ibuku menjadi tebusan baginya, pasti ada sesuatu yang membawanya datang.' Rasulullah ﷺ masuk dan meminta izin, lalu diizinkan. Ketika masuk, beliau berkata kepada Abu Bakar: 'Keluarkan orang-orang yang bersamamu.' Abu Bakar berkata: 'Mereka hanyalah keluargamu, semoga ayah dan ibuku menjadi tebusanmu, wahai Rasulullah.' Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Sesungguhnya telah diberikan izin.'

208.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she heard the Messenger of Allah ﷺ say: 'Any woman who removes her clothing in a place other than her husband's home has torn the veil between herself and Allah, the Mighty and Majestic.'
208.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mendengar Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Wanita mana pun yang melepas pakaiannya di tempat selain rumah suaminya, maka ia telah merobek tabir antara dirinya dan Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung.'

209.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray while wearing a patterned garment of black fabric, with part of it covering him and part covering her.
209.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat dengan mengenakan kain bermotif dari kain hitam, sebagian menutupi beliau dan sebagian lagi menutupinya.

210.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ passed away while we were full from the two black things — dates and water.'
210.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ wafat sementara kami kenyang dari dua hal yang hitam — kurma dan air.'

211.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Umar called out for the prayer, saying: 'The prayer — the women and children have fallen asleep!' So the Messenger of Allah ﷺ came out and said: 'None of the people of other religions wait for it except you.'
211.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Umar berseru untuk shalat, katanya: 'Shalat — para wanita dan anak-anak telah tertidur!' Maka Rasulullah ﷺ keluar dan bersabda: 'Tidak ada seorang pun dari pemeluk agama lain yang menunggunya kecuali kalian.'

212.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered upon her while she had hung a curtain with images of figures on it. His face changed color, then he took hold of the curtain and tore it down, and said: 'Among those who will receive the most severe punishment on the Day of Resurrection are those who imitate the creation of Allah.'
212.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ masuk menemuinya sementara ia telah menggantungkan tirai bergambar patung-patung. Wajah beliau berubah, lalu beliau meraih tirai itu dan merobeknya, seraya bersabda: 'Di antara orang-orang yang akan mendapat azab paling berat pada Hari Kiamat adalah orang-orang yang meniru ciptaan Allah.'

213.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ asked: 'Who is this?' She replied: 'This is so-and-so, daughter of so-and-so, O Messenger of Allah — she does not sleep at night.' He said: 'Stop, stop. Take on only as much worship as you are able, for Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, does not tire until you tire. The most beloved deed to Allah is that which its doer persists in, even if it is little.'
213.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bertanya: 'Siapa ini?' Ia menjawab: 'Ini adalah si fulanah binti fulan, wahai Rasulullah — ia tidak tidur di malam hari.' Beliau bersabda: 'Berhenti, berhenti. Lakukanlah ibadah hanya sebatas yang kalian mampu, karena Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung tidak bosan hingga kalian yang bosan. Amalan yang paling dicintai Allah adalah yang dilakukan secara terus-menerus oleh pelakunya, meskipun sedikit.'

214.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Be gentle, O Aisha. Indeed Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, loves gentleness in all matters.' She said: 'I replied: O Messenger of Allah, did you not hear what they said?' The Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'I have already replied: And upon you.'
214.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Berlemah lembutlah, wahai Aisyah. Sesungguhnya Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung mencintai kelembutan dalam segala urusan.' Ia berkata: 'Aku menjawab: Wahai Rasulullah, tidakkah engkau mendengar apa yang mereka katakan?' Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Aku telah menjawab: Dan atas kalian pula.'

215.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to bathe with the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from a single vessel that contained about a faraq.'
215.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa mandi bersama Rasulullah ﷺ dari satu bejana yang berisi sekitar satu faraq.'

216.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ prayed in a striped garment. When he finished his prayer, he said: 'Take this garment to Abu Jahm and bring me his plain garment, for it distracted me just now from my prayer.'
216.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ shalat dengan mengenakan kain bergaris-garis. Ketika selesai shalat, beliau bersabda: 'Bawalah kain ini kepada Abu Jahm dan bawakan kepadaku kain polosnya, karena kain ini baru saja membuatku lalai dalam shalat.'

217.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray Asr while the sun had not yet left my chamber.'
217.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat Ashar sementara matahari belum beranjak dari kamarku.'

218.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray while I lay stretched out between him and the qiblah, like a corpse stretched out.'
218.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat sementara aku berbaring melintang di antara beliau dan kiblat, seperti jenazah yang terbentang.'

219.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to say in his prostration or his bowing: 'Subbuhun Quddusun, Rabb ul-Mala'ikati war-Ruh — Most Pure, Most Holy, Lord of the angels and the Spirit.'
219.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa mengucapkan dalam sujud atau rukuknya: 'Subbuhun Quddusun, Rabb ul-Mala'ikati war-Ruh — Maha Suci, Maha Kudus, Tuhan para malaikat dan Ruh.'

220.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ never abandoned the two rak'ahs after Asr.'
220.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ tidak pernah meninggalkan dua rakaat setelah Ashar.'

221.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'Do not deliberately seek to pray at sunrise or at sunset.'
221.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Janganlah kalian sengaja shalat tepat pada saat matahari terbit maupun terbenam.'

222.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I took the toothstick, cleaned it, and handed it to him. He began brushing his teeth with it. Then his hand grew heavy and his breath grew labored, and he was saying: "O Allah, grant me the Highest Companion, O Allah, grant me the Highest Companion" — twice. Then he passed away. Aisha said: The Messenger of Allah ﷺ died while he was between my chest and my throat.'
222.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku mengambil siwak, membersihkannya, lalu menyerahkannya kepadanya. Beliau mulai bersiwak dengannya. Kemudian tangannya terasa berat dan napasnya pun terasa berat, dan beliau mengucapkan: "Ya Allah, dengan Teman Tertinggi, Ya Allah, dengan Teman Tertinggi" — dua kali. Kemudian beliau wafat. Aisyah berkata: Rasulullah ﷺ wafat sementara beliau berada di antara dada dan tenggorokanku.'

223.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I perfumed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with my own hands using dharirah during the Farewell Pilgrimage, for both the state of ihram and after coming out of it.'
223.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku memewangikan Rasulullah ﷺ dengan tanganku sendiri menggunakan dharirah pada Haji Wada', baik untuk keadaan ihram maupun setelah keluar darinya.'

224.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to twist the garlands for the sacrificial animals of the Messenger of Allah ﷺ with my own hands. He would then send them off, yet he would not abstain from anything.'
224.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa menganyam kalung untuk hewan kurban Rasulullah ﷺ dengan tanganku sendiri. Kemudian beliau mengirimnya, namun beliau tidak berpantang dari apa pun.'

225.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ said: 'Kill the gecko, for it used to blow fire upon Ibrahim, peace be upon him.' She used to kill them.
225.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Bunuhlah tokek, karena ia dulu meniupkan api kepada Ibrahim 'alaihissalam.' Dan Aisyah pun biasa membunuh mereka.

226.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Sa'd ibn Abi Waqqas and Abd ibn Zam'ah disputed, and the Messenger of Allah ﷺ said: 'The child belongs to the marital bed, and the adulterer gets nothing.'
226.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Sa'd bin Abi Waqqas dan Abd bin Zam'ah berselisih, lalu Rasulullah ﷺ bersabda: 'Anak itu milik tempat tidur pernikahan, dan bagi pezina hanya kehinaan.'

227.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she heard the Prophet ﷺ say: 'Breaking the bone of a deceased person is like breaking it while he is alive.'
227.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia mendengar Nabi ﷺ bersabda: 'Mematahkan tulang orang yang sudah meninggal adalah seperti mematahkan tulangnya sewaktu masih hidup.'

228.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when the Prophet ﷺ wanted to sleep while in a state of ritual impurity, he would perform ablution as for prayer.
228.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa apabila Nabi ﷺ ingin tidur dalam keadaan junub, beliau berwudhu sebagaimana wudhu untuk shalat.

229.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to pray while she lay stretched out on the bed between him and the qiblah, in the room, up against the wall.
229.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ biasa shalat sementara ia berbaring di atas tempat tidur di antara beliau dan kiblat, di dalam kamar, bersandar ke dinding.

230.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), from the Prophet ﷺ, that he would say: 'I seek refuge in Allah from the punishment of Hell, and I seek refuge in Allah from the evil of the Antichrist, and I seek refuge in Allah from the punishment of the grave, and I seek refuge in Allah from the trials of life and death.' She said that he would repeat these and emphasize them.
230.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), dari Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau biasa mengucapkan: 'Aku berlindung kepada Allah dari azab neraka Jahannam, dan aku berlindung kepada Allah dari keburukan Dajjal, dan aku berlindung kepada Allah dari azab kubur, dan aku berlindung kepada Allah dari fitnah kehidupan dan kematian.' Ia berkata bahwa beliau selalu mengulangi dan menekankan doa-doa ini.

231.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding the ruling on breastfeeding an adult man — she said: 'Breastfeed him and he will become forbidden to you.' The narrator said: 'I stayed a year or close to it without narrating it out of awe.' Then he met al-Qasim and told him, and al-Qasim said: 'Narrate it on my authority, for Aisha informed me of it.'
231.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai hukum menyusui laki-laki dewasa — ia berkata: 'Susuilah ia maka ia akan menjadi mahram bagimu.' Perawi berkata: 'Aku tidak menceritakannya selama setahun atau hampir itu karena kagum.' Kemudian ia bertemu al-Qasim dan memberitahunya, lalu al-Qasim berkata: 'Ceritakanlah atas namaku, karena Aisyah memberitahukannya kepadaku.'

232.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Sahla bint Suhayl came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'O Messenger of Allah, we used to consider Salim a son — he would come to me and to Abu Hudhayfa and see me without restriction. Now Allah has revealed concerning them what you know.' He said: 'Breastfeed him five times, and he will be as a son to you through breastfeeding.'
232.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Sahlah binti Suhail datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Wahai Rasulullah, kami biasa menganggap Salim sebagai anak — ia datang kepadaku dan kepada Abu Hudzaifah dan melihatku tanpa batas. Kini Allah telah menurunkan tentang mereka apa yang engkau ketahui.' Beliau bersabda: 'Susuilah ia lima kali, maka ia akan seperti anakmu melalui persusuan.'

233.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding the uncle who sought entry: when the Prophet ﷺ came and she informed him, he said: 'Why did you not permit him to enter? May your right hand be in dust!' — meaning your uncle through breastfeeding.
233.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai paman yang meminta izin masuk: ketika Nabi ﷺ datang dan ia memberitahukan hal itu kepada beliau, beliau bersabda: 'Mengapa kamu tidak mengizinkannya masuk? Semoga tanganmu dilumuri debu!' — maksudnya pamanmu melalui persusuan.

234.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding a matter of the Prophet ﷺ: until Allah, the Mighty and Majestic, permitted him to marry whomever He willed. The narrator said: 'I asked about its source and he replied: I do not know — I believe I heard Ubayd ibn Umayr say that.'
234.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai suatu perkara Nabi ﷺ: hingga Allah Yang Maha Mulia lagi Maha Agung mengizinkan beliau menikahi siapa pun yang beliau kehendaki. Perawi berkata: 'Aku bertanya tentang sumbernya dan ia menjawab: Aku tidak tahu — aku mengira aku mendengar Ubaid bin Umayr mengatakannya.'

235.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Prophet ﷺ used to kiss while fasting and engage in intimate contact while fasting, and he had the greatest control over his desires of all of you.
235.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Nabi ﷺ biasa mencium ketika berpuasa dan bercumbu ketika berpuasa, dan beliau adalah orang yang paling mampu menahan syahwatnya di antara kalian.

236.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), from the Prophet ﷺ, that he said: 'Your children are among the best of your earnings, so eat from the earnings of your children.'
236.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), dari Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Anak-anak kalian termasuk dari sebaik-baik penghasilan kalian, maka makanlah dari penghasilan anak-anak kalian.'

237.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'One night I missed the Messenger of Allah ﷺ from the bed. I felt around and my hand fell upon the soles of his feet while he was in the mosque, with his feet upright. He was saying: "O Allah, I seek refuge in Your pleasure from Your anger, and in Your pardon from Your punishment, and I seek refuge in You from You — I cannot count Your praises. You are as You have praised Yourself."'
237.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Suatu malam aku kehilangan Rasulullah ﷺ dari tempat tidur. Aku meraba-raba dan tanganku menyentuh telapak kakinya sementara beliau di masjid, dengan kaki tegak lurus. Beliau mengucapkan: "Ya Allah, aku berlindung dengan ridha-Mu dari murka-Mu, dan dengan maaf-Mu dari hukuman-Mu, dan aku berlindung kepada-Mu dari-Mu — aku tidak dapat menghitung pujian-Mu. Engkau sebagaimana Engkau memuji diri-Mu sendiri."'

238.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that the Messenger of Allah ﷺ entered Makkah in the Year of the Conquest through Kada', and entered during his Umrah through Kuda.
238.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ memasuki Makkah pada tahun Penaklukan melalui Kada', dan memasuki saat umrah melalui Kuda.

239.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'Revelation would descend upon the Messenger of Allah ﷺ on a cold morning, and his forehead would be dripping with perspiration, peace and blessings be upon him.'
239.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Wahyu pernah turun kepada Rasulullah ﷺ pada suatu pagi yang dingin, dan dahi beliau mengalirkan keringat, shalawat dan salam atasnya.'

240.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I was never as jealous of any woman as I was of Khadijah — and she had died three years before he married me — because of how often I used to hear him mention her. His Lord commanded him to give her the glad tidings of a house of reeds in Paradise, and he would slaughter a sheep and distribute it among her close friends.'
240.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah merasa cemburu kepada seorang wanita sebagaimana aku cemburu kepada Khadijah — padahal ia telah meninggal tiga tahun sebelum beliau menikahiku — karena begitu seringnya aku mendengar beliau menyebutnya. Tuhannya memerintahkan beliau untuk memberi kabar gembira kepadanya dengan sebuah rumah dari bambu di surga, dan beliau biasa menyembelih kambing lalu mendistribusikannya kepada teman-teman dekatnya.'

241.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) regarding a woman who wanted to perform Hajj but complained of illness. She said that the Prophet ﷺ told her: 'Perform Hajj and stipulate a condition, saying: O Allah, I will end my ihram wherever You prevent me.'
241.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) mengenai seorang wanita yang ingin berhaji namun mengeluh sakit. Ia berkata bahwa Nabi ﷺ memberitahunya: 'Laksanakanlah haji dan buatlah syarat, dengan mengucapkan: Ya Allah, aku akan mengakhiri ihramku di mana pun Engkau menghalangiku.'

242.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'I used to enter the room in which the Messenger of Allah ﷺ and my father were buried, and I would remove my outer garment, saying: he is only my husband and my father. But when Umar was buried with them, by Allah, I never entered except with my garment wrapped tightly around me, out of modesty before Umar.'
242.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Aku biasa masuk ke kamar tempat Rasulullah ﷺ dan ayahku dikuburkan, dan aku melepas pakaian luarku, seraya berkata: ia hanyalah suamiku dan ayahku. Tetapi ketika Umar dikuburkan bersama mereka, demi Allah, aku tidak pernah masuk kecuali dengan pakaianku dibalutkan erat-erat di tubuhku, karena malu kepada Umar.'

243.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), from the Prophet ﷺ, that he said: 'If one of you becomes drowsy while praying, let him lie down to sleep until the drowsiness leaves him. If he prays while drowsy, he may end up seeking forgiveness but cursing himself instead.'
243.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), dari Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Jika salah seorang dari kalian mengantuk saat shalat, hendaklah ia berbaring untuk tidur hingga kantuknya hilang. Karena jika ia shalat dalam keadaan mengantuk, bisa jadi ia ingin memohon ampun namun justru mencela dirinya sendiri.'

244.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that when Safiyyah was mentioned and said to have started her menstrual period, the Messenger of Allah ﷺ asked: 'Is she going to delay us?' They said: 'She has already performed the Tawaf al-Ifadah.' He said: 'Then there is no problem.'
244.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ketika disebutkan bahwa Shafiyyah sedang haid, Rasulullah ﷺ bertanya: 'Apakah ia akan menahan kita?' Mereka menjawab: 'Ia sudah melakukan Tawaf Ifadhah.' Beliau bersabda: 'Kalau begitu tidak ada masalah.'

245.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said to Hafsa: 'Tell him that Abu Bakr cannot be heard by the people due to his weeping — if only you would command Umar instead.' She said Hafsa turned to her and said: 'I have never gotten any good from you.'
245.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata kepada Hafsah: 'Katakanlah kepadanya bahwa Abu Bakar tidak bisa didengar oleh orang-orang karena tangisannya — andai saja engkau menyuruh Umar menggantikannya.' Ia berkata bahwa Hafsah berpaling kepadanya dan berkata: 'Aku tidak pernah mendapat kebaikan apa pun darimu.'

246.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she said: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ used to love starting from the right in his purification, his shoes, and his grooming.'
246.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia berkata: 'Rasulullah ﷺ menyukai memulai dari sisi kanan dalam bersuci, memakai sandal, dan menyisir rambutnya.'

247.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that a man came to the Prophet ﷺ and said: 'I used to fast continuously — should I fast while traveling?' He said: 'If you wish, fast; and if you wish, break your fast.'
247.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa seorang laki-laki datang kepada Nabi ﷺ dan berkata: 'Aku biasa berpuasa terus-menerus — apakah aku harus berpuasa saat bepergian?' Beliau bersabda: 'Jika kamu mau, berpuasalah; dan jika kamu mau, berbukalah.'

248.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that Masruq asked her about the option given to them by the Messenger of Allah ﷺ, and she replied: 'The Messenger of Allah ﷺ gave us a choice — does that count as a divorce?'
248.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa Masruq bertanya kepadanya tentang pilihan yang diberikan kepada mereka oleh Rasulullah ﷺ, dan ia menjawab: 'Rasulullah ﷺ memberi kami pilihan — apakah itu dianggap talak?'

249.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her) that she was asked whether the Messenger of Allah ﷺ would sleep while in a state of ritual impurity. She replied: 'Yes, but he would perform ablution as for prayer.'
249.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha) bahwa ia ditanya apakah Rasulullah ﷺ tidur dalam keadaan junub. Ia menjawab: 'Ya, tetapi beliau berwudhu sebagaimana wudhu untuk shalat.'

250.iwh_en: It was narrated from Aisha (may Allah be pleased with her), from the Prophet ﷺ, that he said: 'A man's child is among the best of his earnings — the purest of his earnings — so eat freely from their wealth.'
250.iwh_id: Diriwayatkan dari Aisyah (radhiyallahu 'anha), dari Nabi ﷺ, bahwa beliau bersabda: 'Anak seorang laki-laki termasuk sebaik-baik penghasilannya — yang paling murni dari penghasilannya — maka makanlah dengan bebas dari harta mereka.'
